title: Daoist Canon: Tiandao Jing (Way of Heaven) (Section 3)
description: From the Daoist Canon: Tiandao Jing (Way of Heaven)
introduction: From the Daoist Canon: Tiandao Jing (Way of Heaven)

translation.text: From the Tiandao Jing (Way of Heaven) of the Daoist Canon: One of the foundational scriptures of Chinese Taoism, preserving teachings on internal alchemy, meditation, ritual, and the cultivation of immortality.
